name: airgap
description: Open airgap's local picker to select and safely export AI coding session turns.

interface.shortDescription: Share local AI coding sessions safely
interface.longDescription: Launch airgap's local session picker from Codex, select the turns to include, preview the result, and export without adding a cloud service or resident process.
defaultPrompt: Open airgap share so I can select and export turns from this session.
